data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for follow-up reminders for non-signers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for follow-up reminders for non-signers, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific information or functionality that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The lack of concrete evidence regarding the implementation of follow-up reminders leads to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of follow-up reminders for non-signers functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the follow-up reminders for non-signers requirement.
